## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type
- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Bugfix (fixes existing bug)
- [ ] Docs (documentation update)
- [ ] Chore (dependency update, refactor, etc.)

## Related Issue
Closes #123 (if applicable)

## Test Plan
How did you test this change? Include:
- Test commands run (`pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`, etc.)
- Manual testing steps (if applicable)
- Environment/configuration tested

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] No console warnings or errors
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Commits are signed-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Updated `.env.example` (if adding config)
- [ ] Updated README (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md (under `[Unreleased]`)

## Security Checklist (if applicable)
- [ ] Auth/token handling reviewed
- [ ] SSRF protections preserved
- [ ] Tool allowlists checked
- [ ] No secrets in commit history

## Screenshots
If this is a UI change, include before/after screenshots (if applicable).
